subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto those who have believed in God, the Lord of worlds, that they may follow the laws of God and His commandments which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله رب العالمین لیتبع سنن الله و اوامره التی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
